---
title: "05_model_methylation"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and processed data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(ranger)
library(pROC)
library(tictoc)

dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "model_objects"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

x_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "x_methylation.rds"))
y_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "y_methylation.rds"))

```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Prepare modelling inputs
#--------------------------------------------------

x_methylation <- x_methylation %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

anyNA(x_methylation)
any(!is.finite(as.matrix(x_methylation)))

y_methylation <- factor(y_methylation, levels = c("Yes", "No"))

table(y_methylation)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Train control
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 5,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Elastic net model
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_grid <- expand.grid(
  alpha = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
  lambda = 10^seq(-4, 2, length.out = 50))

set.seed(123)

tic()
model_enet_meth <- train(
  x = x_methylation,
  y = y_methylation,
  method = "glmnet",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = enet_grid,
  preProcess = c("center", "scale"))
toc()

print(model_enet_meth)
print(model_enet_meth$bestTune)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Random forest model
#--------------------------------------------------

rf_grid <- expand.grid(
  mtry = c(5, 10, 20, 35, 50, 75, 100, 150, 250, 400),
  splitrule = "gini",
  min.node.size = c(1, 3, 5, 10, 15, 20))

set.seed(123)

tic()
model_rf_meth <- train(
  x = x_methylation,
  y = y_methylation,
  method = "ranger",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = rf_grid,
  num.trees = 1000,
  importance = "impurity")
toc()

print(model_rf_meth)
print(model_rf_meth$bestTune)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Compare cross-validated results
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_resamples <- resamples(
  list(
    ElasticNet = model_enet_meth,
    RandomForest = model_rf_meth))

summary(meth_resamples)

meth_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  model_enet_meth$results %>%
    mutate(model = "ElasticNet") %>%
    filter(
      alpha == model_enet_meth$bestTune$alpha,
      lambda == model_enet_meth$bestTune$lambda),
  model_rf_meth$results %>%
    mutate(model = "RandomForest") %>%
    filter(
      mtry == model_rf_meth$bestTune$mtry,
      splitrule == model_rf_meth$bestTune$splitrule,
      min.node.size == model_rf_meth$bestTune$min.node.size))

print(meth_model_summary)

write_csv(
  meth_model_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_model_summary.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Saved predictions for best tuning parameters
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_pred <- model_enet_meth$pred %>%
  filter(
    alpha == model_enet_meth$bestTune$alpha,
    lambda == model_enet_meth$bestTune$lambda) %>%
  mutate(model = "ElasticNet")

rf_pred <- model_rf_meth$pred %>%
  filter(
    mtry == model_rf_meth$bestTune$mtry,
    splitrule == model_rf_meth$bestTune$splitrule,
    min.node.size == model_rf_meth$bestTune$min.node.size) %>%
  mutate(model = "RandomForest")

meth_predictions <- bind_rows(enet_pred, rf_pred)

write_csv(
  meth_predictions,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_cv_predictions.csv"))
```

```{r}
enet_cm <- confusionMatrix(
  data = enet_pred$pred,
  reference = enet_pred$obs,
  positive = "Yes")

rf_cm <- confusionMatrix(
  data = rf_pred$pred,
  reference = rf_pred$obs,
  positive = "Yes")

meth_confusion_stats <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    model = "ElasticNet",
    accuracy = as.numeric(enet_cm$overall["Accuracy"]),
    sensitivity = as.numeric(enet_cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
    specificity = as.numeric(enet_cm$byClass["Specificity"])),
  tibble(
    model = "RandomForest",
    accuracy = as.numeric(rf_cm$overall["Accuracy"]),
    sensitivity = as.numeric(rf_cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
    specificity = as.numeric(rf_cm$byClass["Specificity"])))

enet_cm
rf_cm
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. AUC from saved CV predictions
#--------------------------------------------------

auc_enet <- roc(
  response = enet_pred$obs,
  predictor = enet_pred$Yes,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<")$auc

auc_rf <- roc(
  response = rf_pred$obs,
  predictor = rf_pred$Yes,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<")$auc

meth_auc_summary <- tibble(
  model = c("ElasticNet", "RandomForest"),
  auc = c(as.numeric(auc_enet), as.numeric(auc_rf)))

print(meth_auc_summary)

write_csv(
  meth_auc_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_auc_summary.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Variable importance
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_varimp <- varImp(model_enet_meth)$importance %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

rf_varimp <- varImp(model_rf_meth)$importance %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

print(enet_varimp)
print(rf_varimp)

write_csv(
  enet_varimp,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_enet_top_features.csv"))

write_csv(
  rf_varimp,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_rf_top_features.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Save model objects
#--------------------------------------------------

write_csv(
  as.data.frame(enet_cm$table),
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_enet_confusion_matrix.csv")
)

write_csv(
  as.data.frame(rf_cm$table),
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_rf_confusion_matrix.csv")
)

write_csv(
  meth_confusion_stats,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_confusion_stats.csv")
)

write_csv(
  model_enet_meth$results,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_enet_full_tuning.csv")
)

write_csv(
  model_rf_meth$results,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_rf_full_tuning.csv")
)

saveRDS(
  model_enet_meth,
  here("outputs", "model_objects", "model_enet_methylation.rds")
)

saveRDS(
  model_rf_meth,
  here("outputs", "model_objects", "model_rf_methylation.rds")
)
```
